/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/benchmark_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/benchmark.dir/examples/benchmark.cpp.o -o benchmark  libqsecure.a -loqs -largon2 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libssl.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libcrypto.so
